creator: dereks@lifeofadishwasher.com
text:
Created attachment 195161
Expire and deprecate mail/mutt14 including mail/mutt14-lite

mutt 1.4.x last release was 10+ years ago.  I believe this port was an orphan when mail/mutt-devel moved to mail/mutt.

This port should be removed in favor of mail/mutt.
